title: Garlicky Oozing Filipino Chicken Broth
description: A rich, garlicky broth made with Filipino-style bouillon cubes, perfect for a romantic dinner.

ingredients.name: chicken breast
ingredients.notes: Boned and cut into large pieces

instructions: In a large stockpot, combine chicken, water, bouillon cubes, garlic, and black pepper.
Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Skim off any impurities that rise to the surface, then stir in patis (if using) and lemon juice.
Continue to simmer for another 10-15 minutes, or until the broth has reduced slightly and the flavors have melded together.
Strain the broth through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean pot, discarding the solids.
Return the broth to a simmer and cook for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until heated through.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions and a sprinkle of black pepper.
Optional: Serve with steamed rice or noodles for a filling meal.
